requestSemantics: Shared federation-request.schema.json claim envelopes; Lean-SMT owns SMT semantics.
digestBinding: requestDigest via mathevidence-jcs-0.2 over request payload excluding digest
checkerOwner: lean-smt (external); MathEvidence does not replace the checker
versioning: semver on capability + schema pins; historical bundles retain versions
releasePolicy: Fixture harness only (integrationMode=fixture_only). Live upgrade requires human agreement row.
notes: Engineering fixture peer record. Does NOT close ME-404 live federation.
